Benefits of Fortuna Prima Card
Features & Benefits
Support & Services
How to Apply
Attractive Cashbacks
Boost Your Savings: Get upto 0.40% Cashback on all your business expenses with Fortuna Prima Card
* Terms & Conditions  Apply
4th Line Embossing
The corporate’s identity is prominently showcased on the card by elegantly embossing the company's name. This customization allows you to personalize the card according to your preferences, with up to 19 characters, including spaces and department names. The corporate name provided on the application form will be beautifully embossed on your IndusInd Bank Fortuna Prima Card, adding a touch of sophistication and exclusivity
Lounge Benefits
Enjoy 2 domestic complimentary lounge visits every year at airports in India. Relax, enjoy a gourmet meal, comfortable seats and free wi-fi as you wait to embark on the exciting journey.
Click here  for list of applicable lounges
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
This card comes with a waiver of fuel surcharge of 1% at all fuel stations on transactions between INR 500 and INR 10,000
Insurance
Our comprehensive insurance package includes Card Liability Coverage upto INR 25,00,000 and a Corporate Liability Waiver Insurance upto INR 25,00,000, providing protection against the risk of employee fraud. This enhanced coverage ensures our corporate clients are fully safeguarded, offering peace of mind and added security
Terms & Conditions
eStatements -
Both individual and consolidated e-statements will be provided to all customers. Individual e-statements will offer a detailed view of transactions for each account, while consolidated e-statements will summarize activity across multiple accounts or cards, providing a comprehensive overview. These statements will be sent directly to customers, ensuring they have complete visibility into their financial transactions and account summaries.
Consolidated Payments -
At IndusInd Bank, we recognize the challenges and expenses associated with managing individual reimbursement payments. That’s why we offer a One Account, One Payment solution. This service enables companies to make a single consolidated payment, which we then allocate to each employee’s individual card. The total amount due will be clearly outlined in the Corporate Consolidated Statement, and the company will be responsible for making a single payment to the bank for the total amount.
Click here for payment options.
Dedicated Relationship Manager -
Whether you have routine service inquiries or require detailed product clarifications, your designated relationship manager for IndusInd Bank Commercial Cards is exceptionally well-prepared to assist you. With their expertise and resources, they can address all your queries with the utmost professionalism and efficiency. They are dedicated to providing a seamless and comprehensive experience, ensuring that all your needs are met.
Dedicated Customer Service -
Our 24*7 Customer Service officials are pleased to help you in case of an emergency. Please feel free to get in touch with us on our Toll Free Number 1860 267 7777 or write to us at corporate.cards@indusind.com
For any further queries or clarifications or to apply for an IndusInd Bank Commercial Card, please reach us via the appended options.
E-Mail: Please write to us at corporate.cards@indusind.com
Phone Banking: Please call our 24*7 Customer Service officials on our toll free number 1860 267 7777

Commercial Cards
Fortuna AdvantEdge Card
Overview
Overview
Designed with flexibility and ease of use in mind, our Fortuna AdvantEdge Card is the perfect solution for businesses looking to streamline operations and reduce administrative burdens. This card offers the convenience of cash back rewards on both everyday purchases and larger transactions, making it an invaluable tool for managing expenses efficiently. With each use, you not only benefit from enhanced security features but also enjoy financial perks, such as cash back rewards that can significantly impact your bottom line. The Fortuna AdvantEdge Card is crafted to support your business needs, providing a seamless experience that combines practicality with tangible financial benefits.
Please  click here  to view the Benefit Guide
Please  click here  to view the Most Important Terms & Conditions

Benefits of Fortuna AdvantEdge Card
Features & Benefits
Support & Services
How to Apply
Attractive Cashbacks
Unlock Greater Savings: With the Fortuna AdvantEdge Card, the more you spend on your business expenses, the more Cashback you earn. Enjoy Cashback upto as high as 1.10% as your spending increases, with tailored tiers designed to maximize your returns on every transaction.
* Terms & Conditions Apply
4th Line Embossing
The corporate’s identity is represented on the card by embossing the company's name. You can customize the card with the company name according to your preference, with a total of 19 characters available for personalization, including spaces and department names. The corporate name, as specified on the application form, will be elegantly embossed on your IndusInd Bank Fortuna AdvantEdge Card.
Lounge Benefits
Enjoy 2 domestic complimentary lounge visits every year at airports in India. Relax, enjoy a gourmet meal, comfortable seats and free wi-fi as you wait to embark on the exciting journey.
Click here for list of applicable lounges
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
This card comes with a waiver of fuel surcharge of 1% at all fuel stations on transactions between INR 500 and INR 10,000
Insurance
Our comprehensive insurance package includes Card Liability Coverage upto INR 25,00,000 and a Corporate Liability Waiver Insurance upto INR 25,00,000, providing protection against the risk of employee fraud. This enhanced coverage ensures our corporate clients are fully safeguarded, offering peace of mind and added security

eStatements -
Customers will receive both individual and consolidated e-statements, ensuring comprehensive financial oversight. Individual e-statements will provide a detailed breakdown of transactions for each account or card, offering clarity on specific expenditures. Meanwhile, consolidated e-statements will aggregate and summarize activity across multiple accounts or cards, presenting a holistic view of overall financial performance. These e-statements will be delivered directly to customers, facilitating easy access to detailed and summarized financial information for effective management and review.
Consolidated Payments -
At IndusInd Bank, we recognize the challenges and expenses associated with managing individual reimbursement payments. That’s why we offer a One Account, One Payment solution. This service enables companies to make a single consolidated payment, which we then allocate to each employee’s individual card. The total amount due will be clearly outlined in the Corporate Consolidated Statement, and the company will be responsible for making a single payment to the bank for the total amount.
Click here for payment options.
